title: Assistant Store Manager - Easyday - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Easyday - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!
